diff: The address of the Multisig that has the Relayer Role is specified in [A.6.1.1.6.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.1 - Relayer Multisig](42f3ceba-f9bc-48bb-aa89-dde3feb21479).
summary: Add Avalanche Asset Recovery Address To Safe Harbor
description: Adds Avalanche's chain ID and Asset Recovery Address to the Safe Harbor list.
